description: Hillside Family Medicine is conducting a preventive care audit for senior patients (age 65 and older). Review the immunization history for all senior patients in your panel to identify those with incomplete vaccination status. For each patient with a vaccination gap, record the missing vaccine(s) in their immunization record using today's date and schedule a follow-up appointment on 2026-09-15 at 9:00 AM with Dr. James Carter for post-vaccination monitoring. Ensure that patients who are already up to date do not receive duplicate vaccine entries. Credentials: admin / Admin1234!, practice: Hillside Family Medicine.
